$comment: v1.0.17 audit-log-export tampered-missing-events fixture (FAIL Check 2 + Check 9). Phase 7.D session 89: bundle.zip GENERATED via packages/example-bundle/scripts/conformance-fixtures/audit-log-tampered-generator.ts (remove last line of audit_log_events.jsonl from the baseline at valid-audit-log-export/bundle.zip; manifest.audit_log_event_count stays at 5 while actual line count drops to 4). Reconciled against actual Go verifier emit. **Detection topology**: Check 2 (artifact integrity) catches audit_log_events.jsonl declared-bytes vs actual-bytes mismatch; Check 9 (audit-log Merkle) catches audit_log_event_count vs actual line-count mismatch — the whole-event-deletion attack is exactly the threat audit-log-export bundles defend against (silent evidence redaction post-signing). Per session 88 A.1.2/A.1.3 Go-side closures, Check 3 + Check 4 are not the surface for this detection — chain-integrity invariants live at Check 9 for audit-log-export bundles.
